lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਿ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਅਤਿ ਤਿਸਨਾ ਤਜਿ ਵਿਕਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: satigur sev sukh paaeaa at tisanaa taj vikaar |
lines.english: Serving the True Guru, peace is found; intense desire and corruption are discarded.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹੁ ਨ ਚੁਕਈ ਮਰਿ ਜੰਮਹਿ ਵਾਰੋ ਵਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: maaeaa mohu na chukee mar jameh vaaro vaar |
lines.english: Their attachment to Maya does not cease; they die, only to be reborn, over and over again.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇ ਮਨ ਹਰਿ ਦਰਗਹ ਪਾਵਹਿ ਮਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: har har naam dhiaae man har daragah paaveh maan |
lines.english: Meditate on the Name of the Lord, Har, Har, O mortal being, and you shall be honored in the Court of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮ ਮਰਨ ਕਾ ਦੁਖੁ ਗਇਆ ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਬਦੁ ਬੀਚਾਰਿ ॥੪੯॥
lines.translit: janam maran kaa dukh geaa jan naanak sabad beechaar |49|
lines.english: The pains of death and birth are taken away; servant Nanak reflects upon the Word of the Shabad. ||49||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਲਵਿਖ ਪਾਪ ਸਭਿ ਕਟੀਅਹਿ ਹਉਮੈ ਚੁਕੈ ਗੁਮਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: kilavikh paap sabh katteeeh haumai chukai gumaan |
lines.english: All your sins and terrible mistakes shall be taken away, and you shall be rid of your pride and egotism.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਕਮਲੁ ਵਿਗਸਿਆ ਸਭੁ ਆਤਮ ਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਪਛਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh kamal vigasiaa sabh aatam braham pachhaan |
lines.english: The heart-lotus of the Gurmukh blossoms forth, realizing God, the Soul of all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਧਾਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਜਪਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ॥੫੦॥
lines.translit: har har kirapaa dhaar prabh jan naanak jap har naam |50|
lines.english: O Lord God, please shower Your Mercy upon servant Nanak, that he may chant the Name of the Lord. ||50||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਨੁ ਮਨੁ ਸਉਪੇ ਜੀਅ ਸਉ ਭਾਈ ਲਏ ਹੁਕਮਿ ਫਿਰਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: tan man saupe jeea sau bhaaee le hukam firaau |
lines.english: She surrenders her body, mind and soul, O Siblings of Destiny, and lives according to the Hukam of His Command.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਨਾਸਰੀ ਧਨਵੰਤੀ ਜਾਣੀਐ ਭਾਈ ਜਾਂ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਕਾਰ ਕਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: dhanaasaree dhanavantee jaaneeai bhaaee jaan satigur kee kaar kamaae |
lines.english: In Dhanaasaree, the soul-bride is known to be wealthy, O Siblings of Destiny, when she works for the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਵਡੁ ਧਨੁ ਹੋਰੁ ਕੋ ਨਹੀ ਭਾਈ ਜੇਵਡੁ ਸਚਾ ਨਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: evadd dhan hor ko nahee bhaaee jevadd sachaa naau |
lines.english: There is no other wealth as great, O Siblings of Destiny; such is the greatness of the True Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਹ ਬੈਸਾਵਹਿ ਬੈਸਹ ਭਾਈ ਜਹ ਭੇਜਹਿ ਤਹ ਜਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jeh baisaaveh baisah bhaaee jeh bhejeh teh jaau |
lines.english: I sit where He wishes me to sit, O Siblings of Destiny; wherever He sends me, I go.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਸਚੇ ਕੇ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵਾਂ ਭਾਈ ਸਦਾ ਸਚੇ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sadaa sache ke gun gaavaan bhaaee sadaa sache kai sang rahaau |
lines.english: I sing forever the Glorious Praises of the True Lord; I shall remain with the True One forever.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੈਨਣੁ ਗੁਣ ਚੰਗਿਆਈਆ ਭਾਈ ਆਪਣੀ ਪਤਿ ਕੇ ਸਾਦ ਆਪੇ ਖਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: painan gun changiaaeea bhaaee aapanee pat ke saad aape khaae |
lines.english: So wear the clothes of His Glorious Virtues and goodness, O Siblings of Destiny; eat and enjoy the flavor of your own honor.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸ ਕਾ ਕਿਆ ਸਾਲਾਹੀਐ ਭਾਈ ਦਰਸਨ ਕਉ ਬਲਿ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: tis kaa kiaa saalaaheeai bhaaee darasan kau bal jaae |
lines.english: How can I praise Him, O Siblings of Destiny? I am a sacrifice to the Blessed Vision of His Darshan.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਮੰਨਿ ਨ ਜਾਣਨੀ ਭਾਈ ਦੂਜੈ ਭਾਇ ਫਿਰਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: eik hukam man na jaananee bhaaee doojai bhaae firaae |
lines.english: Some do not know how to submit to the Hukam of His Command, O Siblings of Destiny; they wander around lost in the love of duality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਵਿਚਿ ਵਡੀਆ ਵਡਿਆਈਆ ਭਾਈ ਕਰਮਿ ਮਿਲੈ ਤਾਂ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: satigur vich vaddeea vaddiaaeea bhaaee karam milai taan paae |
lines.english: Great is the Glorious Greatness of the True Guru, O Siblings of Destiny; if one is blessed with good karma, He is found.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਤਿਨਾ ਮਨਾਇਸੀ ਭਾਈ ਜਿਨਾ ਧੁਰੇ ਕਮਾਇਆ ਨਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: naanak hukam tinaa manaaeisee bhaaee jinaa dhure kamaaeaa naau |
lines.english: Nanak: they alone submit to His Command, O Siblings of Destiny, who are pre-destined to live the Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਗਤਿ ਢੋਈ ਨਾ ਮਿਲੈ ਭਾਈ ਬੈਸਣਿ ਮਿਲੈ ਨ ਥਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sangat dtoee naa milai bhaaee baisan milai na thaau |
lines.english: They find no place of rest in the Sangat, O Siblings of Destiny; they find no place to sit.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨੑ ਵਿਟਹੁ ਹਉ ਵਾਰਿਆ ਭਾਈ ਤਿਨ ਕਉ ਸਦ ਬਲਿਹਾਰੈ ਜਾਉ ॥੫੧॥
lines.translit: tina vittahu hau vaariaa bhaaee tin kau sad balihaarai jaau |51|
lines.english: I am a sacrifice to them, O Siblings of Destiny, I am forever a sacrifice to them. ||51||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇ ਦਾੜੀਆਂ ਸਚੀਆ ਜਿ ਗੁਰ ਚਰਨੀ ਲਗੰਨੑਿ ॥
lines.translit: se daarreean sacheea ji gur charanee lagana |
lines.english: Those beards are true, which brush the feet of the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਸੇਵਨਿ ਗੁਰੁ ਆਪਣਾ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਅਨਦਿ ਰਹੰਨੑਿ ॥
lines.translit: anadin sevan gur aapanaa anadin anad rahana |
lines.english: Those who serve their Guru night and day, live in bliss, night and day.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੁਖ ਸਚੇ ਸਚੁ ਦਾੜੀਆ ਸਚੁ ਬੋਲਹਿ ਸਚੁ ਕਮਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: mukh sache sach daarreea sach boleh sach kamaeh |
lines.english: True are the faces and true are the beards, of those who speak the Truth and live the Truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸੇ ਮੁਹ ਸੋਹਣੇ ਸਚੈ ਦਰਿ ਦਿਸੰਨੑਿ ॥੫੨॥
lines.translit: naanak se muh sohane sachai dar disana |52|
lines.english: O Nanak, their faces appear beautiful in the Court of the True Lord. ||52||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੀ ਰਾਸੀ ਸਚੁ ਧਨੁ ਉਤਮ ਪਦਵੀ ਪਾਂਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: sachee raasee sach dhan utam padavee paanhi |
lines.english: True is their capital, and true is their wealth; they are blessed with the ultimate status.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਾ ਸਬਦੁ ਮਨਿ ਵਸਿਆ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਮਾਂਹਿ ਸਮਾਂਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: sachaa sabad man vasiaa satigur maanhi samaanhi |
lines.english: The True Word of the Shabad abides in their minds; they are absorbed in the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਸੁਣਹਿ ਸਚੁ ਮੰਨਿ ਲੈਨਿ ਸਚੀ ਕਾਰ ਕਮਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: sach suneh sach man lain sachee kaar kamaeh |
lines.english: They hear the Truth, they believe in the Truth; they act and work in the Truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੀ ਦਰਗਹ ਬੈਸਣਾ ਸਚੇ ਮਾਹਿ ਸਮਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: sachee daragah baisanaa sache maeh samaeh |
lines.english: They are given a place in the Court of the True Lord; they are absorbed in the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਵਿਣੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸਚੁ ਨ ਪਾਈਐ ਮਨਮੁਖ ਭੂਲੇ ਜਾਂਹਿ ॥੫੩॥
lines.translit: naanak vin satigur sach na paaeeai manamukh bhoole jaanhi |53|
lines.english: O Nanak, without the True Guru, the True Lord is not found. The self-willed manmukhs leave, wandering around lost. ||53||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਬੀਹਾ ਪ੍ਰਿਉ ਪ੍ਰਿਉ ਕਰੇ ਜਲਨਿਧਿ ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਪਿਆਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: baabeehaa priau priau kare jalanidh prem piaar |
lines.english: The rainbird cries, "Pri-o! Pri-o! Beloved! Beloved!" She is in love with the treasure, the water.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਮਿਲੇ ਸੀਤਲ ਜਲੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਸਭਿ ਦੂਖ ਨਿਵਾਰਣਹਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: gur mile seetal jal paaeaa sabh dookh nivaaranahaar |
lines.english: Meeting with the Guru, the cooling, soothing water is obtained, and all pain is taken away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸ ਚੁਕੈ ਸਹਜੁ ਊਪਜੈ ਚੁਕੈ ਕੂਕ ਪੁਕਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: tis chukai sehaj aoopajai chukai kook pukaar |
lines.english: My thirst has been quenched, and intuitive peace and poise have welled up; my cries and screams of anguish are past.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਾਂਤਿ ਹੋਇ ਨਾਮੁ ਰਖਹੁ ਉਰਿ ਧਾਰਿ ॥੫੪॥
lines.translit: naanak guramukh saant hoe naam rakhahu ur dhaar |54|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Gurmukhs are peaceful and tranquil; they enshrine the Naam, the Name of the Lord, within their hearts. ||54||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਬੀਹਾ ਤੂੰ ਸਚੁ ਚਉ ਸਚੇ ਸਉ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: baabeehaa toon sach chau sache sau liv laae |
lines.english: O rainbird, chirp the True Name, and let yourself be attuned to the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੋਲਿਆ ਤੇਰਾ ਥਾਇ ਪਵੈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹੋਇ ਅਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: boliaa teraa thaae pavai guramukh hoe alaae |
lines.english: Your word shall be accepted and approved, if you speak as Gurmukh.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦੁ ਚੀਨਿ ਤਿਖ ਉਤਰੈ ਮੰਨਿ ਲੈ ਰਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sabad cheen tikh utarai man lai rajaae |
lines.english: Remember the Shabad, and your thirst shall be relieved; surrender to the Will of the Lord.
